description: Complete remediation of critical and high-priority findings CF-01..CF-06, with automated validations, contract alignment, and auditable evidence.

userStories.title: Define minimum evidence template
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a standard evidence template so each remediation item can be audited consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Create template with mandatory fields: files_changed, commands, command_output, and links
Save the template in a versioned path for the current task
Include one completed example for a finding
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Created versioned template at tasks/task-18_03_26_001314-review-findings-remediation/evidence/v1/minimum-evidence-template.md with mandatory fields (files_changed, commands, command_output, links) and a completed CF-01 example; validation: pnpm run typecheck (pass).

userStories.title: Formalize evidence examples in requirements
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want concrete evidence examples in the requirement document so acceptance is objective per finding.
acceptanceCriteria: Update req-review-findings-remediation.md with an evidence examples section per finding
Cover CF-01..CF-06 with expected evidence per finding
Include a verifiable acceptance checklist per finding
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added 'Evidence Examples by Finding' to req-review-findings-remediation.md with CF-01..CF-06 sections, each containing expected evidence examples and a verifiable checklist. Validation: pnpm run typecheck (pass).

userStories.title: Block passes=true without notes
userStories.description: As a quality gate owner, I want an automated PRD validator so invalid approvals are rejected early.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement a script that fails when passes=true and notes is empty
Expose a verification command in the official scripts contract under verify
Create automated tests for valid and invalid scenarios
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added scripts/validatePrdNotes.mjs to fail when passes=true has empty notes, exposed verify + verify:prd in package.json, added tests/integration/validatePrdNotes.test.ts (valid/invalid cases), and validated with pnpm run test, pnpm run typecheck, and pnpm run verify:prd.

userStories.title: Audit schema vs ConfigReader
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a documented schema-to-runtime audit so contract mismatches are visible.
acceptanceCriteria: Compare schemas/swingbuilder.schema.json with real usage in the config reader and templates
Record discrepancies with file evidence and expected behavior
Publish an audit document with an actionable list of adjustments
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Published audit at tasks/task-18_03_26_001314-review-findings-remediation/evidence/v1/us-004-schema-vs-configreader-audit.md comparing schemas/swingbuilder.schema.json against src/config/ConfigReader.ts, src/config/initConfigCommand.ts, and generator/webview template flows with file-line evidence, expected behavior, and prioritized actionable adjustments; validation: pnpm run typecheck (pass).

userStories.title: Fix hierarchy support in schema
userStories.description: As a config author, I want explicit support for hierarchical structures with tests so complex configs remain valid.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the schema to represent the hierarchies required by the requirements
Add integration tests for valid and invalid hierarchical examples
Ensure compatibility with current runtime usage or document a controlled breaking change
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated schemas/swingbuilder.schema.json to include hierarchical component keys (MenuBar/Menu/MenuItem/ToolBar), added integration validation tests in tests/integration/schema-hierarchy-validation.test.ts for valid/invalid hierarchy examples, and documented hierarchy fields + compatibility in README. Validation: pnpm run test, pnpm run typecheck, pnpm run check (all pass). Change is additive and runtime-compatible with ConfigReader hierarchy support.

userStories.title: Define official scripts contract
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want one official scripts contract so build and verification are consistent across docs and CI.
acceptanceCriteria: Record an architectural decision standardizing the contract as build/verify
Document trade-offs and the compatibility strategy for legacy commands
Publish the contract document under docs
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Published official scripts contract docs at docs/scripts-contract.md and architectural decision at docs/adr/ADR-0001-build-verify-scripts-contract.md, including trade-offs and a legacy compatibility/deprecation strategy for compile/check during build/verify migration; validation: pnpm run typecheck (pass).

userStories.title: Apply scripts contract in repository
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want scripts and documentation aligned with the official contract so local and CI workflows are predictable.
acceptanceCriteria: Update scripts in the root package.json according to the official contract
Adjust references in README and task files related to the contract
Validate execution of core build and verify commands without regression
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Publish coverage artifacts in CI
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want coverage artifacts uploaded in CI so quality evidence is available after every successful run.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the test workflow to upload coverage/lcov-report and coverage/coverage-summary.json on successful runs
Standardize and document artifact name and location
Validate in CI execution that expected artifacts exist
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Mandatory backfill of historical notes
userStories.description: As a quality auditor, I want backfill for historical entries with passes=true and no notes to restore traceability.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify historical entries with passes=true and missing or empty notes
Create backfill evidence in the task structure with before/after links
Associate owner and status for each backfill item
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Reconcile PRD vs implementation
userStories.description: As a tech lead, I want a reconciliation report so each documented divergence has an owner and resolution path.
acceptanceCriteria: Create reconciliation.md with divergences between PRD and implementation
For each divergence, record the decision to fix code, fix documentation, or accept a justified exception
Define owner and deadline for each open item
Do not leave critical divergences without a resolution plan
Typecheck passes
